[公开资料未明确] 公开资料未明确声明该要素；这是 OpenODC 用于度量公开资料缺口的价值点。
[官方声明] WEDA 规则「具备冗余系统，确保系统故障时立即转为最小风险运行模式；具备状态记录、存储及在线监控功能」。

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区自动驾驶装备商业化试点管理办法发布说明

elements.description: [官方声明] WEDA 要求运营方具备不低于 300 万元人民币一般责任保险；通行路线、时间须向政府主管部门报备。

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区自动驾驶装备商业化试点管理办法发布说明

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 电子围栏 + App 实时规则 + 政府许可
boundary_combinations.title_en: Geofence + app runtime rules + government permit
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: Robotaxi 的真实 ODC 由政府批准区域、App 可叫车范围、上车点和实时运营规则共同定义。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: The real ODC of a robotaxi service is jointly defined by approved areas, app-callable zones, pickup points, and runtime operating rules.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉公开资料披露全无人示范运营资格、运营区域扩展和 App 叫车入口，但没有发布机器可读 geofence。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan public sources disclose fully driverless qualification, operating-area expansion, and app ride-hailing access, but not a machine-readable geofence.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 能不能叫到车，就是 L4 服务边界最直观的表现。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Whether the app can dispatch a ride is the most visible expression of an L4 service boundary.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: L4 ODC 与服务运营边界高度重合，应把许可、App 规则和定位共同建模。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: For L4, ODC strongly overlaps service boundary; permit, app rules, and positioning should be modeled together.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉市人民政府 · 萝卜快跑跑向武汉大街小巷
evidence_refs.section: 全无人示范运营资格、运营区域、时段、机场高速、5G 云舱中心

evidence_refs.title: 萝卜快跑 Apollo Go 官方门户
evidence_refs.section: 运营城市、叫车入口和服务规则入口

evidence_refs.title: 萝卜快跑 App Store 官方应用说明
evidence_refs.section: 运营范围、运营时段以约车产品界面为准；极端恶劣天气临时停运

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 夜间全无人运营 + 路灯 / 信号灯 + 晚高峰交通
boundary_combinations.title_en: Fully driverless night operation + street lighting / signals + evening traffic
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 夜间全无人运营不是单一光照要素；它叠加了路灯、信号灯识别、晚高峰车流和站点停靠。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Fully driverless night operation is not a single lighting element; it combines street lighting, signal recognition, evening traffic, and pickup / drop-off behavior.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉经开区资料披露夜间运营延长至 23:00，并描述晚高峰、十字路口和红绿灯识别体验；具体照度阈值未公开。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan sources disclose night operation to 23:00 and describe evening traffic, intersections, and signal recognition; concrete illuminance thresholds are not public.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 夜间可运营不代表所有低照度、眩光或无路灯道路都在边界内。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Night operation does not mean all low-light, glare, or unlit roads are inside the boundary.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 适合与自然驾驶夜间流量和照度分布联动。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Suitable for linking with naturalistic nighttime traffic and illumination distributions.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区 · 全国首个夜间全无人驾驶运营区域
evidence_refs.section: 全无人商业化牌照、夜间运营、感知配置、102 个场景考试

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 机场路线 / 高速行驶 + 批准路线
boundary_combinations.title_en: Airport route / highway driving + approved route
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 机场接送和高速路线能力需要同时满足批准路线、道路限速、定位和运营调度条件。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Airport pickup / drop-off and highway-route capability require approved route, speed limit, localization, and operations-dispatch conditions together.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉市政府报道提到天河机场路线和高速行驶，但没有公开道路级 ODC、速度策略或降级阈值。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan government reporting mentions the Tianhe Airport route and highway-speed capability, but does not disclose road-level ODC, speed strategy, or fallback thresholds.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 机场路线是批准运营路线，不应外推成所有高速均可运营。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: An airport route is an approved operating route and should not be generalized to all highways.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 应在样例中标成路线级边界，而不是泛化成高速公路全允许。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Should be recorded as route-level boundary, not generalized highway permission.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉市人民政府 · 萝卜快跑跑向武汉大街小巷
evidence_refs.section: 全无人示范运营资格、运营区域、时段、机场高速、5G 云舱中心

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 跨江桥梁 + 城市跨区贯通 + 示范区许可
boundary_combinations.title_en: Cross-river bridge + cross-district operation + demonstration-zone permit
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 跨江商业化服务涉及桥梁设施、跨区运营许可、定位连续性和城市道路交通状态的组合。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Commercial cross-river service combines bridge infrastructure, cross-district permits, localization continuity, and urban traffic state.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉英文政府网站披露 Robotaxi 跨越两座长江大桥、实现跨江商业化无人驾驶出行服务。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The Wuhan government English site discloses Robotaxi service crossing two Yangtze River bridges as commercial autonomous ride-hailing.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 跨江运营是地理围栏扩展，不是所有桥梁场景都自动覆盖。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Cross-river operation is a geofence expansion, not automatic coverage of all bridge scenarios.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 桥梁、定位连续性和运营许可应组合建模。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Bridge infrastructure, localization continuity, and operating permit should be modeled together.

evidence_refs.title: Wuhan Government · driverless taxi service across Yangtze River
evidence_refs.section: 跨江商业化无人驾驶出行服务与示范区运营数据

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 狭窄城市道路 / 学校周边 + 人车混行
boundary_combinations.title_en: Narrow urban streets / school area + mixed traffic
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 狭窄道路、学校周边、拥挤交通和行人非机动车混行共同决定城市毛细道路边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Narrow roads, school areas, congested traffic, pedestrians, and non-motorized vehicles jointly define the boundary for urban local streets.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉市政府报道提到经开区基本全域通行，甚至覆盖神龙小学周边、创业路等道路狭窄交通拥挤区域；具体目标物阈值未公开。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan government reporting mentions coverage of narrow and congested areas such as around Shenlong Primary School and Chuangye Road; concrete target thresholds are not public.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: L4 服务能进入小街小巷，但公开资料没有说明每类混行边界。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: The L4 service can enter local streets, but public sources do not specify each mixed-traffic boundary.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这是最需要 DRIVEResearch 暴露分布支持的城市混合交通组合。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: A city mixed-traffic combination that particularly needs DRIVEResearch exposure distributions.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉市人民政府 · 萝卜快跑跑向武汉大街小巷
evidence_refs.section: 全无人示范运营资格、运营区域、时段、机场高速、5G 云舱中心

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 施工绕行 + 行人违章通行 + 场景考试
boundary_combinations.title_en: Construction detour + pedestrian violation + scenario exam
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 施工绕行和行人违章通行属于典型组合场景：临时道路拓扑变化与动态目标违规同时出现。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Construction detours and pedestrian violations form a typical combined scene: temporary road topology changes plus non-compliant dynamic targets.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉经开区报道提到上路许可需经历包括行人违章通行、施工路段绕行等 102 个场景考试，但未公开完整考试参数。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan reporting states vehicles must pass 102 scenarios including pedestrian violations and construction detours, but the full scenario parameters are not public.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 通过场景考试说明有验证入口，但不是公开 ODC 阈值。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Passing scenario exams indicates a validation entry point, not a public ODC threshold.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这类组合最适合作为 OpenODC 与 SOTIF 触发条件的桥接样例。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: A strong bridge between OpenODC and SOTIF trigger-condition candidates.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区 · 全国首个夜间全无人驾驶运营区域
evidence_refs.section: 全无人商业化牌照、夜间运营、感知配置、102 个场景考试

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 全无人车辆 + 5G 云舱 / 远程安全冗余
boundary_combinations.title_en: Uncrewed vehicle + 5G cloud cabin / remote safety redundancy
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 车内无安全员后，远程监控、通信链路、云舱响应和最小风险策略共同构成 L4 运行边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Once there is no in-vehicle safety driver, remote monitoring, communication link, cloud-cabin response, and minimal-risk strategy jointly define the L4 boundary.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉市政府报道披露萝卜快跑在经开区有 5G 云舱中心；管理办法要求远程监控、最小风险运行模式和安全员通知。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan government reporting discloses a 5G cloud-cabin center; local rules require remote monitoring, minimal-risk operation, and safety-operator notification.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: L4 的“无人”并不等于无人监管，远程运营链路是边界的一部分。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: L4 “driverless” does not mean unmonitored; remote-operations links are part of the boundary.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 与 ROAM 的远程运营异常数据库天然互补。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Naturally complementary to ROAM’s remote-operations anomaly database.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉市人民政府 · 萝卜快跑跑向武汉大街小巷
evidence_refs.section: 全无人示范运营资格、运营区域、时段、机场高速、5G 云舱中心

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区自动驾驶装备商业化试点管理办法
evidence_refs.section: 远程监控、安全员、最小风险状态、数据接入和临时管控要求
evidence_refs.notes: This local rule targets autonomous driving equipment; it is used only as a public operating-control analogue, not as an Apollo Go passenger-vehicle manual.

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 推荐上车点 + App 派单 + 手机尾号开锁
boundary_combinations.title_en: Recommended pickup point + app dispatch + phone-suffix unlock
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: L4 Robotaxi 的消费者边界包括推荐上车点、车辆停靠、乘客身份确认和 App 可派单状态。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: The consumer-facing boundary of an L4 robotaxi includes recommended pickup points, vehicle stopping, passenger identity confirmation, and app dispatch availability.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉公开报道描述推荐上车点、App 呼叫和输入手机尾号开锁流程。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan reporting describes recommended pickup points, app ride request, and phone-suffix unlock flow.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 对乘客来说，ODC 的一部分体现为“在哪里能安全上车”。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: For passengers, part of the ODC appears as “where a safe pickup can occur.”
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这说明 L4 ODC 应包含运营交互，不应只写车辆物理能力。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Shows that L4 ODC should include operational interaction, not only vehicle physical capability.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区 · 全国首个夜间全无人驾驶运营区域
evidence_refs.section: 全无人商业化牌照、夜间运营、感知配置、102 个场景考试

evidence_refs.title: 萝卜快跑 App Store 官方应用说明
evidence_refs.section: 运营范围、运营时段以约车产品界面为准；极端恶劣天气临时停运

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 运营时段扩展 + 城市规模服务区
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 运营时段从日间扩展到夜间，再到 6:00 至 2:00，说明 L4 ODC 具有运营阶段性，而不是一次性静态清单。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Operating hours expanding from daytime to nighttime and then to 6:00–2:00 shows L4 ODC is operationally staged, not a static one-time table.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 武汉市政府报道披露 300 台规模、运营时间扩展和江北核心区域贯通运营。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Wuhan government reporting discloses a 300-vehicle scale, expanded operating hours, and cross-area operation in core northern districts.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: Robotaxi 样例应记录“何时能运营”，而不只是“在哪里能运营”。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: A robotaxi sample should record “when it operates,” not only “where it operates.”
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 建议未来把 L4 样例的生效日期和运营阶段作为一等字段。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Future L4 records should treat effective date and operating phase as first-class fields.

evidence_refs.title: 武汉市人民政府 · 萝卜快跑跑向武汉大街小巷
evidence_refs.section: 全无人示范运营资格、运营区域、时段、机场高速、5G 云舱中心

evidence_refs.title: 武汉经开区 · 全国首个夜间全无人驾驶运营区域
evidence_refs.section: 全无人商业化牌照、夜间运营、感知配置、102 个场景考试

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 极端恶劣天气 + App 临时停运
boundary_combinations.title_en: Extreme adverse weather + app-level temporary suspension
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 极端恶劣天气下，L4 服务边界通常以 App 临时停运、无法派单或运营区域收缩的方式体现。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: In extreme adverse weather, an L4 service boundary often appears through app-level temporary suspension, no dispatch, or reduced service area.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 萝卜快跑官方应用说明提示极端恶劣天气将临时停运，运营范围与时段以约车产品界面为准。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: The official Apollo Go app listing states extreme adverse weather may cause temporary service suspension and that service area / time follow the ride-hailing product interface.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: L4 退出未必是车内接管提示，也可能是服务端不派单。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: For L4, exit may appear as no dispatch at the service layer, not an in-vehicle takeover prompt.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这是 L4 与 L2/L3 ODC 表达差异的典型样例。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: A typical example of how L4 ODC expression differs from L2/L3.

evidence_refs.title: 萝卜快跑 App Store 官方应用说明
evidence_refs.section: 运营范围、运营时段以约车产品界面为准；极端恶劣天气临时停运

武汉经开区 · 3000 平方公里城市实验室报道: https://www.whkfq.gov.cn/xwzx/yw/kfqyw/qnxw/202504/t20250422_2570742.html
Baidu Apollo RT6 官方发布稿（PR Newswire 镜像）: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/baidu-unveils-next-gen-autonomous-vehicle-ready-to-provide-driverless-robotaxi-half-of-taxi-fares-301590644.html
metadata.notes: OpenODC 社区已按 2026-05-13 可访问的武汉经开区政府文件、武汉智能交通试点公告、Apollo Go 官方入口与 RT6 官方发布稿复核。本条为武汉示范运营样例；Robotaxi 没有车主手册，权威证据优先级为政府运营规则、示范应用管理文件、官方运营规则和 App 实时电子围栏。公开网页不能支撑统一运行速度上限、具体雨量/能见度停运阈值或完整乘客年龄规则，因此这些项目保留为公开资料未明确或中置信运营规则线索。
